scripts.deploy: next build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && wrangler deploy
scripts.db:drop: wrangler d1 execute cf-feditorrent --remote --command='DROP TABLE IF EXISTS sessions; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS delivery_failures; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS notifications; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS activities; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS follows; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS objects; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS torrents; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS actors;'
